name: The Usurper's Lease
text: When you would spend influence to gain 1 or more command tokens: Increase the amount of influence spent by the number of neighbors you have. Then, return this card to the Ardentia player.

name: Pact Renewed
text: When you perform the primary effect of a strategy card, you may place this card face up in your play area: Perform the secondary effect of that strategy card without spending a command token. At the start of the status phase, return this card to the Verydith player.

name: Hand of the Synod
text: ACTION: Discard up to 1 action card and draw that many action cards + 1. At the start of the status phase, return this card to the Veylor player.

name: Factory Lease: Industrial
text: At the end of your turn, attach this card to an industrial planet you conrol: That planet gains PRODUCTION equal to the number of planets in that system.

name: Factory Lease: Hazardous
text: At the end of your turn, attach this card to a hazardous planet you control: That planet gains PRODUCTION equal to its resource value.

name: Factory Lease: Cultural
text: At the end of your turn, attach this card to a cultural planet you control: That planet gains PRODUCTION equal to its influence value.

name: Archaeological Outpost
text: ACTION: Attach this card to 1 non-home planet. When you activate this planet's system, explore it.

name: Evolutionary Edict
text: When you research a unit upgrade: Produce 1 of those units in your home system. Reduce its cost by the number of its prerequisites. Then, return this card to the Kryxos player.

name: Scroll of Ascension
text: At the start of the strategy phase: Research 1 non-unit upgrade, non-faction technology the Arcanum player does not own. If you do, the Arcanum player may spend 1 command otken from their strategy pool to gain that technology. Then, return this card to the Arcanum player.

name: Swarm Spawn
text: When you produce hits with a unit ability against your opponent's units, place this card face up in your play area. You may place fighters in a system contianing 1 of your ships equal to the number of hits produced. Then, return this card to the Xytheris player.

name: Shard of Nothingness
text: ACTION: Draw 3 unused red-backed tiles. Choose 1 and place it adjacent to 2 systems. If it contains no planets, place a frontier token in that system. Then, purge this card and the unchosen tiles.

name: Revenant Alliance
text: When you receive this card and you are not the Revenant Glory player, place it face up in your play area: While this is in your play area, you can use the Revenant Glory player's Pantheon commander ability if it is unlocked. If you activate a system that contains 1 or more of the Revenant player's units, return this card to the Revenant player.

name: Thronebound Covenant
text: ACTION: Place an unused throne planet into your home system and gain control of it. Then, purge this promissory note.

name: Funeral Services
text: At the start of a round of combat, place this card face up in your play area: Each time a fighter is destroyed during this combat roll a dice, for each result greater than 5 place that fighter on this card. At the start of your next turn place each fighter in systems that contain your ships. Then, return this card to the Aeterna player.

name: Thunderbird Prototype
text: At the start of space combat select 1 of your ground forces in that system: That unit participates in combat as if it were a ship and you may treat them as Galvanized until the end of the combat. Return this card to the Ponthous player at the end of that combat.
